name: Rich Spinach Soup (Korean Ginchang Sigumchi Kuk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach thoroughly, then trim off the thick stems. Chop the scallion and mince the garlic.
2. Heat the sesame oil in a heavy-bottomed pot. Brown the ground beef, separating the particles while stirring. Add the scallion, garlic, soy sauce, salt, and pepper, and stir for 30 seconds. Add the water, then the spinach. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce the heat. Place a tight-fitting lid on the pot. Do not remove the cover until the soup is ready to be served. Simmer for 10 minutes.
